candidates.why: Finance income is not operating revenue; true top-line is labeled 'Net revenue' in the preview, which is outside the candidate list.

Tax line, not revenue; present candidates do not include the actual revenue line.

candidates.row_label: Comprehensive Income - Attributable to Owners of Parent Company - Total
candidates.why: Comprehensive income measure, not revenue; correct revenue is 'Net revenue' outside candidates.

candidates.why: Minority share of comprehensive income, not revenue.

Deferred income (liability), not the revenue line of the income statement.

variables.notes: REVIEWED. The true top-line revenue is clearly labeled 'Net revenue' in the Income Statement preview, but this row is not included in the provided candidate list. All candidates are non-revenue items (finance income, taxes, comprehensive income, or deferred revenue). I therefore selected 'Net revenue' from the full A-column and flagged this for manual review. | Escape-hatch used (final_choice outside candidate list): [Income Statement] Net revenue

candidates.why: This is a direct cost tied to providing services/projects and is the best proxy for cost of sales/COGS.
Large operating cost but likely includes both production and overhead personnel; better treated as SG&A/operating expense rather than pure COGS given separate subcontractor expense line.
Described as other operating expenses, more indicative of SG&A/overhead than direct COGS.
Similar to 'Other Operating Expenses'; overhead bucket rather than direct production cost.
Overhead cost, not direct COGS.
Represents total operating expenses (sum of multiple components), not a pure COGS line; should avoid totals when a direct cost component exists.
Financial item, not COGS.
Finance costs related to leases, not cost of sales.
Residual finance cost; not COGS.
Non-operating item, not COGS.

candidates.row_label: Current prepaid expenses and other receivables
candidates.why: Balance sheet asset, not an expense line.
Balance sheet liability; not the P&L COGS line.

variables.notes: Uses the direct service/production cost line 'Expense for subcontractors and disbursements' as COGS; avoids totals and overhead buckets.

candidates.why: Operating overhead bucket, but there is a more explicit SG&A label available.
Another overhead bucket; related to 'Other Operating Expenses'.
Explicit SG&A line and populated; per hierarchy rules, this should be used alone when available and populated.

candidates.row_label: Brands, Patents, Trademarks, Marketing & Artistic Intangibles - Gross
candidates.why: Balance sheet intangible asset, not a period SG&A expense.

variables.notes: An explicit SG&A line 'Selling&general exp.' exists and is populated, so it is selected alone per the SG&A hierarchy rules, instead of the broader operating expense buckets.

candidates.why: Explicit research and development expense line; directly matches XRD definition.

variables.notes: Clear standalone R&D expense line is available and used directly.

candidates.why: Direct interest expense line; primary choice for XINT.

Balance sheet liability, not an income statement interest expense.

final_choice.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental

variables.notes: Uses 'Interest expense' as the primary interest expense line, with 'Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental' as a secondary fallback label if the primary line is missing in some periods.

candidates.row_label: Share of profit (loss) of associates and joint ventures accounted for using equity method

candidates.row_label: Investments accounted for using equity method
candidates.why: Non-current asset, not equity.

candidates.row_label: Total equity attributable to owners of parent
candidates.why: Book equity attributable to the owners/parent, excluding non-controlling interests; ideal for BE per instructions.
Includes non-controlling interests according to the layout (since NCI is listed separately and then a total); less preferred than owner equity line for BE to avoid double counting with MIB.
Balancing-only row, not full equity; should be avoided.
Balancing-only row; not appropriate for BE.
Technical balancing row, not the substantive equity figure.

candidates.row_label: Balancing Item - Total Liability and Equity
candidates.why: Balancing row, not pure equity.
Sum of equity and liabilities; not suitable as BE.

final_choice.row_label: Total equity attributable to owners of parent

variables.notes: Chooses owner/parent equity ('Total equity attributable to owners of parent') to exclude non-controlling interests from BE, as required.

candidates.why: Income statement allocation of profit to minorities, not the balance sheet interest itself.
Balance sheet line representing minority (non-controlling) equity interests; primary choice for MIB.
Appears to be an alternate/duplicated label for the same non-controlling interests; using both could double count.
Income statement flow to minority interests, not the balance sheet stock.

candidates.row_label: Comprehensive Income - Attributable to Minority Interest - Total
candidates.why: Comprehensive income allocation to minorities; not the balance sheet minority interest.

variables.notes: Uses the Balance Sheet line 'Non-controlling interests' as the minority equity (MIB). The separate 'Minority Interest' row appears duplicative, so only one is selected to avoid double counting.
